compiled_state.title: Refactor bridge-outbound.py::process_outbound (629 lines) into event handler functions
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Extract 7 event handlers (_handle_create_event, _handle_status_event, etc.) from process_outbound(). Reduce main function to ~50-line dispatcher. Each handler <100 lines. AC: process_outbound <80 lines, no function >150 lines, all tests pass.

comments.body: AC amendment: Extracted event handlers must be placed as separate modules inside plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/ (created by prerequisite task 3024-104c). Each of the 7 handlers becomes its own .py file inside bridge/. Add re-export statements to plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py. Original bridge-outbound.py becomes a thin dispatcher. Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/__init__.py && ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/*.py | grep -v __init__
comments.author: Test
